author: aqav
description: Add views to show "outgoing links" and "backlinks" of canvas in Obsidian.

manifest.author: aqav
manifest.description: Show the "links" between Canvas and File.
manifest.name: Canvas Links

name: Canvas Links

releases.author: aqav
releases.description:
Select command "Obsidian Links: Open" to open a view if it is the first time to use plugin

- fix bug "Failed load canvas-links" at obsidian startup
- update package json and readme

releases.author: aqav
releases.description:
- Focus card when jump into canvas
- Merge Files and Canvas panes into one
- Extend clickable area in pane
- Support canvas contained in another canvas
- Make the panel render works more like links
- Icon
- Performance
- Fix bugs
- Code work

releases.author: aqav
releases.description:
- more explicit description in command and README
- add a command to register all views together
- use `getAbstractFileByPath` rather than for loop all files by `getFiles` for performance

releases.author: aqav
releases.description:
- using `cacheRead` to improve the performance
- reusing the `workspaceLeaf` instead of detaching it every time
- change the name to **Canvas Links** for more explicit description

releases.author: aqav
releases.description:
- Separate command for function independency
- Change name to Canvas View

releases.author: aqav
releases.description:
Main commits:

- Fix the bug if there is an empty canvas in the vault [#1](https://github.com/aqav/obsidian-canvas-more/issues/1)
- Add a new view to show which files the current canvas contains
- Replace the SVG HTML elements with the [lucide icon](https://lucide.dev/)
- Change the plugin name to "Canvas More"

releases.author: aqav
releases.description: Implement the base function as README describe
